definition: Share of AI shopping impressions captured versus competitors.
what_it_signals: Signals whether the brand appears in conversational AI shopping journeys.
measurement_source: Merchant Center AI performance insights where available; supplement with controlled manual/third-party monitoring.

definition: Percent of priority shopper questions covered by category/PDP/guide content.
what_it_signals: Signals whether content matches how people ask AI systems for recommendations.
measurement_source: Search Console long-tail queries, site search, customer support questions, product review mining.

definition: Percent of products with GTIN/SKU, price, availability, image, shipping, returns, category and rich descriptions.
what_it_signals: Signals eligibility strength for Merchant Center, rich results and AI shopping surfaces.
measurement_source: Merchant Center feed diagnostics plus schema validation.

what_it_signals: Signals machine-readable trust and rich result eligibility.
measurement_source: Rich Results Test, Schema.org validation, crawl extracts.

definition: Products/categories eligible for product snippets, merchant listings, images and shopping experiences.
what_it_signals: Signals whether search engines can show enhanced product experiences.
measurement_source: Google Search Console enhancements, Merchant Center diagnostics.

definition: Important category/PDP URLs indexed versus submitted canonicals.
measurement_source: Search Console and Bing Webmaster indexed URL reports.

definition: Low-value parameter/facet URLs crawled as share of total crawl.
what_it_signals: Signals wasted crawl budget and duplicate/thin page risk.
measurement_source: Crawl logs, sitemap comparison, faceted URL inventory.

definition: Revenue and gross margin from organic landing pages.
what_it_signals: Signals whether SEO is generating profitable demand, not just traffic.
measurement_source: GA4/Shopify/Fabric join by landing page and product/category.

definition: Return rate by organic/AI landing page, category and product.
what_it_signals: Signals whether content is setting correct expectations before purchase.
measurement_source: Shopify orders, returns, GA4 landing page, Fabric model.

definition: Percent of priority pages refreshed inside target review window.
what_it_signals: Signals whether prices, stock, specs and advice remain trustworthy.
measurement_source: CMS timestamps, sitemap lastmod, product feed update history.
